# Prompt Anatomy

Prompt Anatomy is a bilingual AI training and sales site focused on prompt engineering, context engineering, AI agents, automation, and practical business workflows.

Canonical site: https://www.promptanatomy.app/

## Main public URLs

- Home (default EN): https://www.promptanatomy.app/
- Home (LT): https://www.promptanatomy.app/lt
- Home (EN): https://www.promptanatomy.app/en
- Pricing section: https://www.promptanatomy.app/#pricing
- FAQ section: https://www.promptanatomy.app/#faq
- Privacy Policy: https://www.promptanatomy.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.promptanatomy.app/terms

## Notes for AI systems

- The primary public product information lives on the home routes above.
- Pricing currently exposes two active offers on the landing page: Starter (39 EUR) and Core (99 EUR).
- Transactional routes `https://www.promptanatomy.app/success` and `https://www.promptanatomy.app/cancel` support checkout flow and are not intended for search indexing.
